title: Tofu Italian Bowl
description: A simple, plant-based Italian-inspired bowl dish made with pan-seared tofu and served over a bed of mushy Norwegian bowl pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the mushy according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Add the tomato sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Simmer the sauce for a few minutes until heated through.
Serve the tofu and sauce over the cooked mushy.
Garnish with fresh basil and serve immediately.
